evals.prompt: Turn this feature discussion into a PRD and file it as a GitHub issue.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, synthesizes current context into PRD using the template, publishes to https://github.com/BdM-15/proj-theseus/issues with needs-triage label. Does NOT interview the user first.

evals.prompt: We just finished discussing the JSON schema validation feature. Create a PRD from this conversation.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, explores repo for domain vocabulary and ADRs, writes Problem Statement / Solution / User Stories / Implementation Decisions / Testing Decisions / Out of Scope, files issue with needs-triage label.

evals.prompt: I want a PRD for adding workspace-level skill permissions. Write it up and submit it.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, synthesizes requirements from context, identifies relevant modules, produces full PRD, submits to GitHub Issues tracker with needs-triage label.
